query: SELECT id, name, position, "altPositions", overall, club, nationality FROM players WHERE name IN ('Sávio', 'Savinho', 'W. Zaïre-Emery', 'M. Zaire-Emery', 'Álvaro Carreras', 'Á. Carreras', 'D. Huijsen', 'Dean Huijsen') ORDER BY name;
